channel.title: Inaccessibility on Digital Derg: A Deep Map
channel.description: Recent content in Inaccessibility on Digital Derg: A Deep Map

item.title: "Such dismal and loansom Places are very apt to make frightful and melancholy Impessions upon the Minds for Weak and Ignorant"
"Briars encompass it so thickly, and with such aggressiveness, one cannot approach within five or six feet of the mound"
"You will find instead only stumps, bumps, and conquering armies of weeds, cruel in their strength"
